meta.title: Truist — Digital Banking Platform
meta.description: I built and scaled a 30-person design org at SunTrust across all lines of business, then led business and commercial banking design through the $66B merger to Truist.

hero.label: Truist Financial
hero.title: Defining the Digital Experience for America's 7th Largest Bank
hero.subtitle: I built and scaled a 30-person design organization at SunTrust — owning every line of business — then led business and commercial banking design through the largest bank merger since 2008.

context.challenge: Scaling a design practice ahead of a $66B merger.
context.scope: All lines of business (SunTrust); Business & Commercial Banking (Truist); Design System
context.body: I inherited a nascent UX team at SunTrust with no research function and no independent design voice. I scaled it to a 30-person design organization covering Consumer, Small Business, Wealth Management, and Commercial Banking. When the $66B merger with BB&T created Truist, I led the UX methodology and design execution for business and commercial banking across the newly merged entity.

sections.label: Consumer Banking
sections.imageAlt: Truist mobile home screen showing accounts, cards, and quick links for Janet
sections.caption: The everyday banking experience. Accounts, transfers, and Zelle — designed for speed.

sections.label: AI-Assisted Banking
sections.imageAlt: Truist Assist chatbot in light and dark mode showing conversation flow from home screen through credit card offers to agent escalation
sections.caption: Truist Assist. Conversational banking with contextual card controls and a live-agent handoff path.

images.alt: Truist Apple Watch banking app showing Transfer and Pay with micro-banking widgets for balance, bills, and recent payments
Truist banking dashboard on iPad showing recent activity, weekly spending chart, and credit card management
Top 10 U.S. Bank composite showing Truist mobile home screen, Face ID sign-in, and the Digital Feature Toggle System dashboard
Truist One Checking account opening flow showing application start, multi-account upsell for savings and money market, and personal information form
Truist commercial wealth management portal showing a $149M institutional portfolio with holdings breakdown across desktop and mobile
Truist internal banker portal showing commercial application pipeline with pipeline metrics, completion rate, and top performer tracking
